basicInfo.name: Nightmare Lania
basicInfo.flavor: Lania became the true ruler of the Blizzard Plains by protecting the vast icy territory for many, many years.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Freeze. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Ice Shard
Skill 1.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 285% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Freeze. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 285% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Blizzard
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 95% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Freeze. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 95% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Ruler of Ice
Passive.desc:
All Allies
 - Grants Freeze Immunity. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Freeze Immunity upon using a basic attack 1 time(s). [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]

profile.story:
The queen of the ice spirits.
In ancient times, during the events of Ragnarok, the ice dragons gave their lives to fight to preserve the freedom of the elves and dwarves.
Their last wish was to be remembered for all of time.
Lania, the leader of her elven tribe at the time, accepted this charge. She gave up her beating heart to turn herself into an ice spirit devoid of all emotion so that she could withstand the weight of this eternal vigil.
However, eons later, she fell in love with a human hero, and the two had a child together.
Her newborn son Spike, being half-human, could not withstand the cold touch of his mother.
While elves helped raise the child, Lania herself could not even hold him.
She wished for her child to live a normal human life and was unwilling to give him the throne and the duty of eternal vigil over the ancient dragons that came with it.
However, as Spike matured, his power grew stronger and stronger, to the point that several ice spirits, her former subjects, began to follow him instead.
Sensing that Spike's ascent to the throne would be inevitable, Lania tried to rob Spike of his emotions and memories with the power of Crimsonblooms to turn him into an ice spirit.
She planned for his complete transformation into an ice spirit by having him strike her down.
It would be her ultimate sacrifice as his mother.
